# feat(kaizen-observability): expose facade surface

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `5535fe6cd9e9` — feat(kaizen-observability): expose facade surface

**Body**:

Public imports for kaizen.observability. Every name eagerly imported
so __all__ entries are statically resolvable (rules/orphan-detection.md
§6 — no lazy __getattr__ for advertised API). Cross-SDK Protocol
reference in the module docstring so downstream consumers route to
the canonical kailash.diagnostics.protocols contract.

PR#6 of issue #567.
